drift: Login page lacks ThemeToggle; gate tokens stay at light-mode defaults on fresh navigation. Console page correctly initializes dark mode.
likelyCause: ThemeToggle only rendered in UploaderHome, not in login layout
fixDirection: Shared theme-init script in root layout.tsx

drift: Header bg hsl(220 20% 10%) and main bg hsl(220 20% 8%) differ by only 2% lightness — header not visually distinct
likelyCause: --gate-header-bg not overridden in dark mode; light-mode value coincidentally near dark bg
fixDirection: Optional: lighten header to hsl(220 20% 14%) or add bottom border. Acceptable if merged header/body is intentional.
